name: Glazed Cinnamon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a rectangular pan, 13x9x2 inches.
3. Mix brown sugar and cinnamon; set aside.
4. In a large bowl, combine Bisquick® baking mix, milk, and granulated sugar until a dough forms.
5. If the dough is too sticky, gradually add enough Bisquick® baking mix (up to 1/4 cup) until it becomes easy to handle.
6. Turn the dough out onto a surface generously dusted with Bisquick® baking mix. Gently roll the dough to coat it evenly.
7. Shape the coated dough into a ball and knead 10 times.
8. Roll the dough into a rectangle, approximately 15x9 inches.
9. Spread the softened margarine over the dough.
10. Sprinkle the brown sugar mixture evenly over the dough.
11. Sprinkle raisins evenly over the sugar mixture.
12. Roll up the dough tightly, starting at the 15-inch side.
13. Seal the edge of the dough by pinching it into a roll.
14. Cut each roll into 1 1/4 inch slices with the cut sides down in the pan.
15. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
16. Let cool for 5 minutes, then remove from the pan.
17. Make the glaze by mixing powdered sugar and milk until smooth.
18. Spread the glaze evenly over the warm rolls.
